title: Blue Archives Craft
description: A mod representing the original Blue Archive game.
body:
# SUMMARY / 概述 **致力于做最还原的蔚蓝档案模组。**\ Committed to developing the most faithful mods.\ **1.18.2 版本早已弃坑。**\ The 1.18.2 version has stopped maintenance.\ **以下的“BA”指的是原版蔚蓝档案游戏。**\ The 'BA' below refers to the original Blue Archive game. **CONTENT / 内容** **添加了大量 BA 材料和爱用品，使用招募获取学生按 Z 使用她们的能力。**\ Add a lot BA materials and Unique Items. Use 招募 to obtain a student's ability and press Z to use her skill. ``` /blue_archivescraft #指令可以查看学生能力信息。 #The command can look up the ability of each student. ```
Spoiler 沙漠有概率偶遇牢梦。
There is a chance to come across Yume in the desert.
**开局玩家会出生在 BA 故事序章的列车上，通过与会长互动到达主世界。**\ Players begin aboard BA's prologue train. Through dialogue with the Student Council President, they are teleported to the overworld.
Spoiler 列车末尾有彩蛋。
There is an easter egg at the end of the train carriage.
**进入主世界后会获得几个物品：**\ You will get some items after join overworld: 1. 招募 2. 什亭之匣/Casket Shittin 3. 神奇小物品（AI 对话/AI Chat） 4. 阿罗娜的印章/Arona Seal 5. 大人的卡片 6. 一些建筑生成券/Some Structure Tickets **Mod 还原了 BA 里众多建筑：**\ This mod faithfully recreates numerous structures from BA: 1. 千禧年科技学院/Millennium Science School 2. 歌赫娜/Gehenna Academy 3. 阿拜多斯/Abydos High School 4. 基窝托斯街道/Kivotos Street 5. 山海经/Shanhaijing Academy 6. 百鬼夜行/Allied Hyakkiyako Academy **还有各种学生的雕像。**\ and some students' statues.
Spoiler 在mc你也要还债！
You've got debts to pay in Minecraft too!
# CONFIGURATION / 配置 **本 Mod 支持主界面和存档创建界面使用动态背景图。**\ This mod enables dynamic backgrounds on both the Title Screen and Create World Screen.\ **第一次启动游戏会生成：`blue_video.json` 和 `blue_start_video.txt` （在 `mods` 同级文件夹）。**\ During the initial game launch, the system generates `blue_video.json` and `blue_start_video.txt` at the same directory level as the `mods` folder.\ **`blue_start_video.txt` 用于控制是否开启动态背景界面。**\ The `blue_start_video.txt` file regulates the activation state of the Dynamic Background Interface through boolean flag control.\ **`blue_video.json` 用于配置动态背景界面。**\ The `blue_video.json` configuration file defines parametric attributes for the Dynamic Background Interface's rendering behavior.\ **注意，接下来的Json格式不支持注释，请将注释删掉后再对应修改配置！**\ WARNING: The following JSON format does NOT support comments. You must remove all comment notation before modifying configurations. ``` { "totalFrames": 618, //文件数量 / Filecount "folderPath": "blue_pv", //文件夹名字 / Foldername（放在mods同级文件夹） "fileNameFormat": "%s/pv%03d.png", //文件名字 / Filename（pv000.png，pv001.png） "frameRate": 10 //帧数 / Framerate } ``` **重命名音频文件为 `music.wav` 放在 `mods` 同级文件夹即可自动在游戏加载时播放。**\ To enable automatic playback during game loading, rename your audio file to `music.wav` and place it at the same directory level as the `mods` folder. **支持自动切换 ysm 模型。**\ Supports automated switching between YSM Models.\ **重命名模型为对应学生英文：如 未花的模型 重命名为 `mika.ysm`。**\ Rename models using corresponding student English names, e.g. `mika.ysm`. # NOTES / 注意事项 1. 游戏第一次启动会弹出一个 Swing 窗口，是该 mod 的指南 / On the first game launch, a Swing window displays as the mod's guide interface. 2. 最好使用 Openjdk 或 Oracle 运行，否则 core 可能会失效（不过影响不大）/ For optimal performance, use OpenJDK or Oracle JRE. Otherwise, core mods may become ineffective (though impact is minimal). 3. 请勿在什亭之匣或开局列车维度丢物品或者生成实体，这些实体会被清除 / Do not drop items or spawn entities in the Casket Shittin or the prologue train dimension. Such entities will be forcibly cleared. 4. 由于 Mod 太大(300 多 MB)，并且频繁更新，建议前往[QQ](https://qm.qq.com/q/kOBjkp7t0Q "QQ")群下载：797300664 / Due to the mod's large size (more than 300 MB) and frequent updates, we recommend downloading it via the [QQ Group](https://qm.qq.com/q/kOBjkp7t0Q "QQ Group"): 797300664. 5. 本 Mod 的学院生成券生成的建筑是根据距离动态生成，需要玩家走遍学院区域才会生成完毕 / Buildings spawned by this mod's Campus Generation Ticket are dynamically generated based on proximity, and will only fully generate after the player traverses the entire campus area. 6. 自动切换 ysm 模型，ysm 版本必须为：`yesstevemodel-forge-1.20-2.4.1-release`，否则会崩溃。 / Automatic YSM model switching requires the exact version of Yes Steve Model: `yesstevemodel-forge-1.20-2.4.1-release`. Otherwise, the game will crash. ``` /blue_archivescraft_tools [关闭/开启]旧版结构生成系统 #该指令可以设置使用旧版结构生成系统（无视距离直接生成） #This command activates the legacy structure generation system, which ignores distance and generate the full building immediately. ```
